name: publico
title: Publico
description: Uma extensão do Raycast para receber as últimas notícias do Público, mantendo-o informado em tempo real diretamente da sua barra de comandos.
author: caasols

commands.name: latest-headlines
commands.title: View Latest News
commands.subtitle: Publico
commands.description: Shows the latest headlines from Publico

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
